3313180.name: Blade N' Blood
3313180.description:
Blade N' Blood is a zombie wave game where you’ll face off against waves of the undead, collecting souls along the way to power up your weapons and gear. Each wave challenges you a little more, giving you the chance to gather resources and prepare for the final fight against The Rabid.

In "Waves" mode, you’ll take down zombies, upgrade your setup, and aim to make it through every round. It’s all about staying on top of each wave and gearing up to take down The Rabid once and for all.
3313180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
